description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical flashlight with a rugged, textured grip along its body for secure handling. The head of the flashlight is slightly wider and features a faceted design, likely for impact resistance and to prevent rolling. The front end houses a reflective cone and a central LED bulb, while the rear end is capped with a flat, slightly recessed surface, possibly a button or cap for battery access. The body appears to be made of durable black plastic or polymer, with a matte finish that reduces glare. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for handheld use in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or during nighttime activities. There are no visible brand markings or display screens, emphasizing its straightforward, functional nature.
description: A rugged, black cylindrical flashlight with a textured grip and a faceted head, featuring a central LED bulb and a flat rear cap. Designed for handheld use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the flashlight, highlighting the textured grip and faceted head.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the flat, slightly recessed end cap, likely for battery access or a power button.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the cylindrical body and grip texture, with the head and tail visible.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the reflective cone and central LED bulb inside the flashlight head.
